data.content:
Implemented the doctor completion fix on branch feat/doctor-command.

Changes:
- `loom doctor --fix` now wires zsh completions into `~/.zshrc` and bash completions into `~/.bashrc` instead of only writing completion files.
- completion checks now require startup wiring for the managed zsh/bash install locations, so doctor no longer reports them as installed prematurely.
- added regression tests for zsh/bash fix flows and serialized env-mutating doctor tests.

Validation:
- `cargo test -p loom-cli doctor`
- `cargo test -p loom-cli`

Commit:
- `926452e` Fix doctor completion install wiring
